2441 South Park Ave, Buffalo, NY 14220, USA

American persimmon tree. There were a lot of persimmons on 11/4/22, but many of them were high up on the tree. The persimmons were still somewhat astringent, even after letting them sit on the counter for a few days after picking them. Access: Public. Falling
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
Apple tree in need of repair, bugs overgrown and no good fruit. Access: Public.
Fair apple tree, has a little overgrowth around it but has better apples than the other apple tree on other side of the bridge. Access: Public.
Fair apple tree, has a little overgrowth around it but has better apples than the other apple tree on other side of the bridge. Access: Public.
Pear trees at end of street, is owned by someone and will have to ask for permission to pick any. Access: Private.
A few patches of wild black raspberries here on side of road. Out of season now and have now fruit anymore. Access: Public.
Apple tree near parking lot for McCullagh Coffee Roasters.  Free street parking. Access: Private. Falling Fruit season: August-October.
